title: FlowMCP Grading Selection Lockfile (DEPRECATED in gradingSpec 2.0.0)
description: DEPRECATED in gradingSpec/2.0.0. The standalone selection.lock.json is removed; member pins now live in index.json.lockSnapshot (see 16-selection-lockfile.md §11.2 and §11.5). Retained for historical reference only — new tooling MUST NOT validate against this schema.

selectionVersion.description: Snapshot of selection.json.selectionVersion at generation time.

selectionHash.description: Snapshot of selection.json.selectionHash at generation time.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the lockfile was generated.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned schemaVersion at lockfile generation time.

schemaHash.description: Pinned schemaHash at lockfile generation time.

gradingStatus.description: stable = last full grading was Grade A/B; pending = no stable grading or invalidated by schema-bump. See 21-pre-conditions.md §20.2.
